description: NEXUS parallel agent mesh — prompts per lane. Pair with docs/AGENT-MESH.md. Node runner: NEXUS/agents/run-nexus-waves.js

waves.name: Renderer strategy
prompts: Read VISUAL-TECH-ROADMAP.md and js/engine.js; propose phased WebGL1 + optional WebGPU vs big-bang migration.
Output JSON proposals with phase, safariIosRisk, featureDetectionFallback, peerConflicts (≥2 lanes).

waves.name: WebGPU / WGSL
prompts: Audit js/nexus-engine/wgsl-graph.js and Show tab; feature-detect WebGPU; document Safari degradation.
Propose spikes only; no silent swap of main WebGL loop.

waves.name: WebGL1 / scenes
prompts: Extend js/scenes with GL1 raymarch or feedback techniques; respect HEAD uniforms and iOS cost.
Optional: scoped WebGL2 migration plan per scene — do not bulk-rewrite without ADR.

waves.name: Post + hybrid
prompts: Align js/post.js effects with Aurora Field to avoid duplicate bloom; preserve hybrid failure isolation.

waves.name: Audio → GPU
prompts: Document AU texture and band mapping; keep contract stable for new shaders.

waves.name: Performance + mobile
prompts: Review adaptive quality and iOS caps in engine.js; pair changes with BENCHMARK-HARNESS.md.

waves.name: Standards + interop
prompts: Maintain browser capability matrix; prefers-reduced-motion; MediaRecorder caveats.

waves.name: CrossValidator
prompts: Merge proposal arrays; resolve targetFile+changeType conflicts; apply weights from AGENT-MESH.md.
Emit P0/P1/P2 backlog; block low security/safari scores without fallback.

waves.name: Regression gate
prompts: Run checklist: DOM safety, REC/Present, mic silent, hybrid isolation, storage keys.
